title: Up All Night
lyrics: Love, are we feeling perfect? If the moment breaks this time, can you cry or fight? Anything I never thought There's a life lesson here you'll learn There's a life lesson here you'll find In each choice you make, there's a one zero death Happiness, death, and are you enlightened? Are you enlightened yet? I'd say, ooh, that's what you're here for Ooh, you know you're looking at me through my head You're looking so good Got me thinking about you Got me thinking, thinking about your own love Ooh, baby, ooh, ooh, ooh You got me feeling great Up all night, I said Baby, you, you got me feeling so high Ooh, baby, up all night Ooh, got me feeling mad Ooh, up all night again Ooh, got me feeling mad You got me feeling mad Ooh, baby, up all night again You got me feeling All night So you can't get out now Oh, yeah, oh, yeah, oh, yeah, oh, yeah Ain't got no more time to throw in the shower Oh, yeah, oh, yeah, oh, yeah, oh, yeah, oh, yeah, oh, yeah Ooh, up all night Up all night, I'm telling you Ain't no way You got me thinking You got me thinking My dream went to up all night again A little up, up all night Up, up, up all night You can't bring up up all night Let me take a chance Ooh, baby, ooh, ooh You got me feeling up Up all night again All night long Ooh, you got me feeling so good Baby, all night long I'm up all night long Ooh, you, you got me feeling Yeah, you got me feeling like Ooh, up all night long Oh, yeah Ooh, baby, up all night long Again, just go slow More fast, more fast, more fast Ooh No matter how long We got up all night Tonight might be the night That we come together Come, come, come The little sun is set And you, baby, up all night You got me feeling Up, up, up all night Again Ooh, baby, yeah You got me feeling Up, up, up all night Again Ooh, baby, yeah You got me feeling Up, up, up all night Again Ooh, ooh, ooh You got me feeling Up, up, up all night Again Sometimes Something that gets hard I just cry We can't find each other I don't know Like a maniac I forget Up, up, up all night Again Ooh, ooh
